rulings.Case Title: MONICA D. KENNEY VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 24, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR, notice of Settlement filed October 22, 2014. (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS WALTMOM VS. ROBERT K. SIMPSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alt Summ Judgmnt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 24, 2014, Line 2: PLAINTIFF TRAVIS WALTMOM MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication: Denied. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) and failed to state specifically in the notice and repeat verbatim in the separate statement "the specific cause of action, affirmative defense, claims for damages, or issues of duty." Motion for summary judgment is denied. Triable is issue of fact exists as to the plaintiff's compliance with CCC 1965(b) (UMF #11) and as to the value of plaintiff's property (UMF #79). (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: COLBERT TOY DARE ET AL VS. SOUL LOUNGE LLC DBA BRICK AND MORTAR
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 24, 2014, Line 9: DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Copy of the Lease and addenda attached to the complaint on file are complete. Defendant and its counsel failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C and must do so in future. Prevailing party prepare order. (501/GLW) - Late Tentative

rulings.Case Title: DLD I GROUP LLC VS. STEVEN STUART ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 24, 2014, Line 10: DEFENDANT STEVEN STUART's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer base don non-payment of rent. All allegations in the complaint must be taken as true and cannot be challenged on a demurrer. Notice compliance with SFRO. (501/GLW) - Late Tentative

rulings.Case Title: J. YO WONG VS. BING JING CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 24, 2014, Line 11: DEFENDANTS ZENG FAN and BING CHEN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Whether "Perfect Foot Massage Center" is a tenant and whether "Bin" in "Bings" aka are issues of fact not properly addressed on demurer. Defendants and their counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. (501/GLW) - Late Tentative

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion On Demurrer By Defendant Maria Andrade To Complaint Of Plaintiff Sophie Lau
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 24, 2014, Line 12: DEFENDANT MARIA ANDRADE's Demurrer To Complaint: overruled, 5 days to answer. "December 1, 2014" is a typo and is clear from the notice that the rent demanded accrued through August 31, 2014 and presumably from December 1, 2013. Complaint sufficiently alleges the exact amount of rent due. Prevailing party prepare order. (501/GLW) - Late Tentative

rulings.Case Title: JOAN KONG VS. MICHAEL COMERFORD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, October 24, 2014, Line 13: DEFENDANT MICHAEL COMERFORD's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: Granted. Notice is fatally defective. Plaintiff failed to comply with SFRO 37.9B(c)(2) and provide "the dates the percentages of ownership were recorded" as to each co-owner. (501/GLW) - Late Tentative
